---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed enhancement.

Examples:

* new preset
* new CLI option
* migration helper
* Node compatibility improvement
* CI workflow enhancement
* documentation improvement

## Problem Statement

What problem does this solve ?

Example:

Current workflow requires repetitive manual configuration.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Optional.

What alternatives were considered ?

## Compatibility Impact

Would this affect existing users ?

Examples:

* no breaking change
* backward compatible enhancement
* breaking CLI behavior
* config migration required

## Scope

Select relevant area(s):

* CLI
* presets/base
* presets/swift
* presets/wordpress
* npm packaging
* GitHub Actions
* documentation
* migration tooling
* compatibility

## Additional Context

Optional examples / references / mock usage.
